steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table and scan for the row with the output named in the question. The input that works gives $8$. This is just a table lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the same value.

steps.title: Set the function equal to 64
steps.content:
The function is $g(x)=8x$. The condition $g(x)=64$ means:
$$8x=64$$
